name: FRIEDMAN INDUSTRIES INC
business: Friedman Industries is a manufacturer and processor of metals operating in two reportable segments: flat-roll products and tubular products. The flat-roll segment sells to metals distributors and customers manufacturing products such as metal buildings, railcars, heavy equipment, and tanks. The tubular segment sells to steel and pipe distributors and manufactures API licensed line pipe and oil country pipe.
sellsTo: Manufacturers of metal buildings, railcars, heavy equipment, tanks, containers, trailers, component parts

exposures.sentence: Both pipe mills are American Petroleum Institute ( API ) licensed to manufacture line pipe and oil country pipe and also manufacture pipe for structural purposes that meets other recognized industry standards.

The Board of Directors (the Board ) of the Company is responsible for the oversight of the Company s cybersecurity program and recognizes the risks that cybersecurity threats may impose on the Company, its business partners, employees and investors.
